name: agent-system
label: Agent System
description: Projects that ARE AI agent systems: cognitive orchestration, LLM pipelines, multi-agent workflows, tool-use frameworks.
profile_description: LLM inference via API; agent loops run locally or on managed runtimes. Track costs and token usage per run.
run_context_additions: - Document every prompt template change in PROGRESS.md with before/after and observed behavioral delta.
- Track token usage and API costs per run session; record in action_log or RUN_CONTEXT.md.
- Never hardcode API keys; always load from environment variables or a secrets manager.
- Use bounded loop discipline (max_iterations, timeout, cost ceiling) for any agentic loop.
- Log agent decisions and tool calls at INFO level for replay and debugging.
workflow_notes: Treat prompt files as first-class code: version them, review changes, track regressions.
Use the `bounded-loop-runner` skill for any agent loop that may iterate unboundedly.
Evaluate agent behavior on a fixed test harness before shipping prompt changes.
Separate retrieval layer from generation layer — memory is not the model.
Document agent boundaries, handoff formats, and escalation paths in AGENTS.md.
safety_notes: Cost acknowledgment required before any paid inference run exceeding estimated budget.
Never allow agents to modify authoritative memory files without a human review gate.
Sandbox tool-use permissions to least privilege — deny by default, allow explicitly.
Log and audit every external tool call made by an agent (shell, browser, file writes).
Test safety constraints (block_dangerous.py equivalents) before deploying new hooks.
